titles.title: Oh the Thought That Jesus Loves Me

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh the thought that Jesus loves me More than I can understand Fills my heart with calm assurance I am safe inside His plan.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So I will let it change and heal me Let it ease my troubled mind. Oh the thought that Jesus loves me That he loves me for all time.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: O, the thought that Jesus loves me And He loves what I will be. Some sweet day When He has finished His creative work in me.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: OH, the thought that Jesus loves me Loved when we were far apart. When my will was set against Him Loved enough to win my heart.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I will let it change and heal me Let it ease my troubled mind. Oh, the thought that Jesus loves me That he loves me for all time.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Oh, the thought that Jesus loves me That He'd choose a cross to die Take the death I was deserving Just to offer me new life.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: So I will let it change and heal me Let it ease my troubled mind. Oh, the thought that Jesus loves me That he loves me for all time. Oh, the thought that Jesus loves me.
